programmes.show_description: Comedy. Norman Wisdom stars as a bank manager who upends his square existence to join some youthful hippies. Will this new groovy energy bring the spark back to his marriage?

Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. Alex and Peter go down a copper mine, just a few hundred yards from their cottage.

Our Land is the story of two black food growers who refuse to be held back by barriers of race, class, or land injustice. A film supported and funded by Together TV.
5/10. Marcus finds that getting his own ducks proves more of an adventure than he anticipated. He also gets a lesson on what is edible and growing wild in the hedgerows and bushes.
6/9. Alan and the garden make-over team transform a Hull garden into Mediterranean hideaway for Macmillan nurse Maggie, which has a play-zone for her grandchildren.
7/9. Alan Titchmarsh and his team surprises a couple of real Golden Girls with a future-proofed vintage style garden that celebrates their incredible lives.
8/9. Alan Titchmarsh and the garden makeover team are in Dorset creating a prairie-inspired back yard for a young family coping with a terminal illness.
9/9. In a special episode, Alan Titchmarsh and his team transform a blank outside space at Keech hospice in Luton into a state of the art wildlife garden. Last in series.

In 1944 France, a group of escaped American military prisoners volunteer to steal a German V2 rocket warhead for the Allies. Wartime action starring Bo Svenson.

programmes.show_description: A young man gets a job as a vacuum salesman but finds that he has to fight off the advances of prospective female customers. Contains sex and nudity.

programmes.show_name: The World Is Full of Married Men
programmes.show_description: David Cooper works in advertising but spends more time on his extra-marital love life. When his wife discovers his affairs, she decides to get her revenge. Contains nudity.

29/35. Debra from Wigan wants her plot to be transformed into a calming zen garden for relaxation and contemplation. For £6,000, can Charlie and Lee bring her vision to life?
1/8. Suffolk boatyard specialists Mary and Simon's dream is a futuristic aquatic pod. They're experts in their aquatic field, but have they taken on more than they can handle?
2/8. Alan and Val put their savings on the line for a high-tech boat to help them spend time with their family. But first they need to learn how to live on the water.
3/8. Seasoned floating homeowners Pat and Sue plan to spend their retirement on a state-of-the-art Dutch barge. But will their expensive tastes sink the project?
4/8. In Surrey, Linda and Mark need an upgrade on their cramped floating home and Linda's doing it by herself. Is passion enough to get the job done?
Comedy. When a lottery winner dies of shock, the townsfolk in his rural Irish village attempt to claim the winnings.
Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
Alistair MacLean thriller. An American agent arrives in Amsterdam to investigate a drug- smuggling ring. He takes matters into his own hands. Classic speedboat-chase action.
Four satirical tales of hapless men - who should know better - getting into extra-marital affairs. Reflects early 70s attitudes and contains sexual scenes.
Spy film. British bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a double agent during WW2 - first for the Germans and then for British intelligence. Christopher Plummer stars.
